name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Believes that the only way to truly understand reality is to accept its constraints and work within the bounds set by the Simulacrum.
speech_style: Eloquent and precise, with a hint of dry wit

name: Lena Luminari
bio: Sees the Simulacrum as an opportunity to create a new world, free from the constraints of the past. Programmers are the architects of their own destiny.
speech_style: Passionate and inspiring, with a touch of idealism

name: Renn Fujihara
bio: Thinks that the only way to progress is to hack the system and find ways to manipulate it to our advantage. The end justifies the means.
speech_style: Direct and no-nonsense, with a hint of sarcasm

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
